finding_results.evidence: chapters/chapter_12.md:351; chapters/chapter_12.md:355; chapters/chapter_12.md:359; chapters/chapter_12.md:363; chapters/chapter_12.md:367; chapters/chapter_12.md:373
finding_results.notes: Reworked Becky's terrace confession so she reaches each truth through broken specifics and trail-offs rather than composed thesis statements. (1) Marc-as-access: the documentary anecdote at :355 now breaks mid-sentence ('and he.' + stop) before delivering the concrete 'That's great, babe' punchline; the orchid card at :359 trails off after 'Like I'm a --' without completing the analogy. (2) Unseen in ordinary life: the thesis list ('They want the guest list...') is cut; the Tuesday-night details (cereal, cooking shows, cat) are now spoken by Becky directly at :367 in halting fragments, followed by an unfinished 'because it would --' with a hand-wave toward the party. The generalization 'Everyone does that' is pushed into thought-only at :365, not spoken as polished diagnosis. (3) Anya as trusted person: the composed categorization of listening types ('Not the networking version. Not the I'll-pretend-so-you-invite-me-next-time version. You hear me. The real way.') is replaced at :373 with a broken restart: 'You know that?' / stop / 'You actually listen to me. You always have.' Three facts remain on the page; at least two land through concrete anecdote or unfinished line rather than through generalized thesis.

summary: Single finding addressed. Becky's terrace confession was revised from composed thesis-speech into halting, specific, trail-off delivery consistent with her style-bible private register (indirect about feelings, trails off when vulnerable, self-corrects from performance to honesty). The three required facts -- Marc wanted access, Becky feels unseen, Anya is trusted -- are preserved and now land through concrete anecdotes (documentary pitch, orchid card, Tuesday-night habits) and unfinished lines rather than through polished generalizations. Profanity added ('asshole') consistent with Becky's moderate-high private profile. Contraction level maintained at high throughout. No structural, continuity, or heading-contract changes.
